content_body:
Cascade Outdoors is a boutique outfitter that customizes its Ocoee whitewater rafting trips to fit each group’s needs—be they hardcore enthusiasts aching to push the limits or nervous beginners who need a little more guidance.

This company will help you organize your Ocoee Rafting trip—whether it is a family trip, youth group retreat, or a corporate team-building exercise—so you can create a unique and memorable experience that is right for your group.

Surrounded by the towering hemlocks and the Virginia pines of the Cherokee National Forest and boasting class III and IV rapids (which are best described as large waves with significant rapids that include moderate drops), the Ocoee River promises a whitewater rafting trip that is sure to please both the young and the young at heart.

Each group is joined by a professionally trained expert guide, with extensive whitewater experience, as well as CPR and first aid training. Members of the staff have faced the rivers of India, Nepal, Costa Rica, New Zealand, Ecuador, and more, so they will be ready for whatever the Ocoee River throws their way.
title: Cascade Outdoors
